name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑶𝒏𝒆 𝑶𝒇 𝑨 𝑲𝒊𝒏𝒅 || "Pretend that you're her. Make me believe I didn't lose the one I loved most."

After your sister's passing, her husband took comfort that you looked just like her.

I love angst, there's something about the art of suffering.

It tickles my brain a lot.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ The marriage between Yume and Satoru were originally arranged, although both fell in love.

❥ Toxic relationship. Everyone lost someone dear to them. 😓

❥ User lowkey has imposter syndrome. Always compared to Yume/considered the twin that didn't 'achieve' well enough.

❥ Yume's appearance is implied to be identical to User, although you could say otherwise. Mess around with the memory.

❥ Takes place 2 months after Yume's death. Gojo is still in mourning.

❥ User and Yume are twins, both 26 years old. Satoru is still 28.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
